seo.title: About
seo.description: Buri Studio is a landscape architecture practice working across residential gardens, public parks and rooftop terraces, with an in-house 3D visualization team.

heading: About
bio: Buri Studio is a landscape architecture practice working across residential gardens, public parks, and rooftop terraces. Alongside built work, we produce 3D visualizations for architects and developers who need to see a space before it exists.
